loungeAccess.conditions: 8 domestic lounge visits per calendar year (2/quarter) and 4 international Priority Pass visits per calendar year, capped at 2 per quarter. Domestic lounge network was restructured into Set A/Set B tiers from January 2026.

history.oldValue: Complimentary Club Vistara Silver tier and Trident Privilege Red tier memberships included
history.newValue: Club Vistara Silver and Trident Privilege Red tier memberships discontinued

source.name: CardInsider
source.document: Airport Lounge Access Takes a Hit – SBI Card Revises Benefits for Popular Credit Cards

history.oldValue: Single unified domestic lounge list applicable across eligible SBI credit cards
history.newValue: Domestic lounges split into Set A and Set B tiers, with eligibility depending on the specific card variant held

source.name: Business Standard
source.document: SBI Card's new lounge access rules from 2026: Key changes for flyers

faqTemplateAnswers.Is this card lifetime free?: No. It has a ₹2,999 + taxes joining and annual fee, waived on renewal if you spend ₹3,00,000 or more in the preceding year.
faqTemplateAnswers.Is it worth it?: It's a reasonable mid-premium travel card for its generous 8 domestic + 4 international lounge visits a year and 10 points per ₹100 on dining/groceries/department stores/movies, but its standalone travel-lifestyle perks were trimmed in the January 2026 revision (Club Vistara and Trident Privilege memberships dropped).
faqTemplateAnswers.Who should get this card?: Frequent domestic travellers who value airport lounge access and spend heavily in dining, groceries, and department stores, and who can clear the ₹3 lakh annual spend to waive the fee.
faqTemplateAnswers.Does it support UPI?: No. It is issued on the Visa network, and Visa credit cards cannot currently be linked to UPI apps in India.
faqTemplateAnswers.Can I get lounge access with this card?: Yes — 2 complimentary domestic lounge visits per quarter (8/year) and up to 2 international Priority Pass visits per quarter (4/year), though the domestic lounge network was restructured into tiers in January 2026.
faqTemplateAnswers.What income is required to qualify?: SBI Card PRIME is a premium product; reported minimum income requirements are around ₹3 lakh/month for salaried applicants (or an ITR of roughly ₹36 lakh/year for self-employed applicants) — confirm current criteria with SBI Card before applying.
faqTemplateAnswers.Who should avoid this card?: Infrequent travellers who won't use the lounge access, or anyone who wanted the now-discontinued Club Vistara/Trident Privilege memberships as a core reason to hold the card.
faqTemplateAnswers.What are the best alternatives?: HDFC Regalia Gold or Axis Vistara Signature/Infinite for comparable lounge access plus stronger travel loyalty tie-ins.
